violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside freezer and refrigerator needs cleaning more frequently.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of hood needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls, and ceiling need to be clean more frequent

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. refrigerated food was not label or dated.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice chute needs cleaning more frequently.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls and ceiling needs cleaning more frequently.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
